professor.title: Assistant Professor / 讲师
professor.biography_text: 2005年北京理工大学获得计算机应用博士学位。 2005年至今北京李彤大学计算机学院教师。 Received the PhD degree in Computer Science and Technology from Beijing Institute of Technology, China, in 2005. 2005~Present: Assistant Professor with the School of Computer Science, Beijing Institute of Technology, Beijing, China.
